name: Intruder No, I'm not human/NINAH
description:
You thought that when he put a head on a stick right outside your house he was trying to threaten you. But now you think he was implying a different kind of head....

Do you guys consider JACKING OFF to be a sport? Because thats kinda what this bots about, you two had a night of passion and youre tired and he... Isn't just yet.

I saw this image of him and HAD to make a bot lollsieies

Jokes aside i do hope you guys like it.. teehee..
creator: Clomlia
